niche: done-for-you data pipeline service for mid-market B2B SaaS
icp: Heads of Data and founding data engineers at 20–200 person B2B SaaS companies who need reliable ETL/ELT but can't justify a full data-infra hire
goal: Launch a lead-magnet site that converts qualified data teams into discovery calls for a done-for-you data pipeline service, then iteratively optimize conversion.
notes: Operator is a principal engineer who fulfills work orders manually after clients buy. Prefer frugal, reversible choices that compose with Cloudflare + Google Workspace.
